search.query: | inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup apic_host | table apic_host | eval apic_host="apic_host!=".apic_host | mvcombine apic_host | eval apic_host=mvjoin(apic_host, " AND ")
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup mso_host | table mso_host

condition.set: eventtype="cisco_dc_aci_*" component=credentials | fields apic_host | dedup apic_host | sort 0 apic_host

search.query: | inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | search mso_host=$mso_host$ | dedup apic_host | table apic_host | eval apic_host="apic_host=".apic_host | mvcombine apic_host | eval apic_host=mvjoin(apic_host, " OR ")
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | dedup mso_host | table mso_host

condition.set: eventtype="cisco_dc_aci_*" component=credentials $not_search_apic_host$ | fields apic_host | dedup apic_host | sort 0 apic_host
| inputlookup cisco_dc_mso_site_details | search mso_host=$mso_host$ | dedup apic_host | table apic_host

html.p: This dashboard provides details of All Tenants. It provides details on Total number of Bridge Domain's, VRFs, EPGs per Tenant along with Health Score.

search.query: eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_health component=fvTenant dn="*/health" $formed_apic_host$ NOT "code" | dedup dn | search twScore | table name, twScore | rename name AS Tenant | rename twScore AS "Heath Score" | join type=outer max=0 Tenant [search eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_health component=fvAEPg dn="*/health" $formed_apic_host$ NOT "code" | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats count(name) by Tenant | rename count(name) AS "EPGs" | table EPGs, Tenant ] | join type=outer max=0 Tenant [search eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_health component=fvBD dn="*/health" $formed_apic_host$ NOT "code" | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats count(name) by Tenant | rename count(name) AS "Bridge Domains" | table "Bridge Domains", Tenant ] | join type=outer max=0 Tenant [search eventtype=cisco_dc_aci_health component=fvCtx dn="*/health" $formed_apic_host$ NOT "code" | dedup dn | rex field=dn "uni\/tn-(?<Tenant>[^\/]+)" | stats count(name) by Tenant | rename count(name) AS "VRFs" | table "VRFs", Tenant ] | table Tenant, "Bridge Domains", "VRFs", "EPGs", "Heath Score" | fillnull value=0 | rename Tenant As Name | sort 0 Name
